assignments.name: planningNotes
assignments.value: We need to fix the accessibility issues in the navigation component — keyboard navigation is broken for screen readers. Also, the button component needs a new `size` prop (sm, md, lg) as part of the design system update. The tooltip component should auto-dismiss after 5 seconds. We should add comprehensive unit tests for the form components to improve test coverage. The storybook documentation is outdated and needs to be updated to reflect the latest API changes for input, select, and checkbox components.

parameters.text:
=You are a software engineering manager creating GitHub issues from sprint planning notes.

Planning Notes:
{{ $json.planningNotes }}

Extract every distinct, actionable task from the notes and create a GitHub issue for each one.

For each issue produce:
- title: concise, imperative sentence (e.g. "Fix keyboard navigation in nav component")
- body: well-structured Markdown including:
  - ## Summary (what the issue is)
  - ## Context (why it matters)
  - ## Acceptance Criteria (bullet list of what done looks like)
- labels: array of relevant labels from: bug, enhancement, documentation, testing, accessibility, design-system, refactor
- assignee: null (leave unassigned)

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON array of issue objects. No markdown code fences, no extra text. Example format:
[
  {
    "title": "Fix keyboard navigation in nav component",
    "body": "## Summary\n...",
    "labels": ["bug", "accessibility"],
    "assignee": null
  }
]

options.systemMessage: You are an issue creation assistant. You only output valid JSON arrays. Never include markdown code blocks, backticks, or any text outside the JSON array.
